# ROOF EXPRESS

> Diamond Certified roofing contractor serving 63 Bay Area cities. Residential & commercial roof repair, replacement, flat roofing, gutters, skylights. CSLB #1072766. Free estimates at 650-666-5554.

  Best roofing company near you in the Bay Area. 5-star rated roofer for roof repair, replacement, flat roofing, gutters & skylights. Diamond Certified, GAF Master Elite, CSLB #1072766. Free estimates.

  ROOF EXPRESS 3-checkpoint methodology: rapid tear-off, mid-point inspection, final audit. Most roofs completed in 2-3 days.

- [Roofing Services — Repair to Replacement](https://roof-ex.com/services)
  Full-service Bay Area roofing: residential, commercial, flat roofs, gutters, skylights, and 24/7 emergency repairs.

- [Residential Roofing — Shingle & Tile Systems](https://roof-ex.com/residential)
  Expert residential roofing for Bay Area homes. Asphalt shingles, tile, slate — Diamond Certified installation with 50-year warranty.

- [Commercial Roofing — TPO & Flat Roof Systems](https://roof-ex.com/commercial)
  Commercial roofing for Bay Area businesses. TPO, modified bitumen, single-ply systems. Title 24 compliant. Zero-downtime protocol.

- [Flat Roofing — TPO, Torch-Down & Coatings](https://roof-ex.com/flat)
  Bay Area flat roof specialists. TPO membrane, modified bitumen, torch-down, and silicone coatings. Ponding water solutions.

- [Roof Repair — Fast Leak Fixes, Same Day](https://roof-ex.com/roof-repair)
  Same-day roof repair in the Bay Area. Leak detection, emergency tarping, flashing repair, and shingle replacement.

- [Roof Replacement — Full System, 50-Year Warranty](https://roof-ex.com/roof-replacement)
  Complete roof replacement by Diamond Certified contractors. GAF Master Elite installation with up to 50-year manufacturer warranty.

- [Gutter Installation — Seamless Aluminum & Copper](https://roof-ex.com/gutters)
  Custom seamless gutter installation for Bay Area homes. Aluminum, copper, steel systems. Proper sizing and slope for maximum drainage.

- [Skylight Installation & Repair — Velux Certified](https://roof-ex.com/skylights)
  Velux skylight installation, repair, and replacement. Sun tunnels, deck-mount & curb-mount skylights. Leak-free flashing guaranteed.

- [Emergency Roof Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Response](https://roof-ex.com/emergency)
  24/7 emergency roof repair across the Bay Area. Storm damage, active leaks, emergency tarping. Call 650-666-5554 now.
